title: aurinia leucadea subsp. media
intro: Aurinia leucadea subsp. media, also known as the alpine sweet rocket or alpine wallflower, is a flowering plant in the mustard family native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Aurinia leucadea subsp. media include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestive health. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
